opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had this terrible, constant pain under my right ribs since dinner last night, and it shoots straight through to my right shoulder.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Constant pain that hasn't gone away since last night, now with fever and vomiting.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 8 hours ago, following a fatty meal
symptom_narrative.duration: continuous since it started — hasn't let up like previous episodes
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: under my right ribs, radiating to my right shoulder tip
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, not settling like it usually does
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: not sure, it just hasn't stopped
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe nausea, vomited three times, alternating chills and sweats, no appetite at all, feel generally unwell
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had shorter, milder episodes like this before after fatty food, but they always went away in a few hours — this one hasn't stopped
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: moving around is hard, holding my right side

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: daughter present and able to drive her to hospital

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to know if this is the same as before or something more serious

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes symptoms clearly, daughter may help relay some details
